en.extract:
The dark-necked tailorbird (Orthotomus atrogularis) is a songbird species. Formerly placed in the "Old World warbler" assemblage, it is now placed in the family Cisticolidae.
It is found in Bangladesh, Northeast India and Southeast Asia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest.
It is often kept as a pet.


References

 Media related to Orthotomus atrogularis at Wikimedia Commons

[[File:Dark-necked Tailorbird, Thailand.jpg|thumb|Dark-necked tailorbird, Thailand]]

The '''dark-necked tailorbird''' ('''''Orthotomus atrogularis''''') is a [[songbird]] [[species]]. Formerly placed in the "[[Old World warbler]]" assemblage, it is now placed in the [[Family (taxonomy)|family]] [[Cisticolidae]].

It is found in [[Bangladesh]], [[Northeast India]] and [[Southeast Asia]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical [[mangrove forest]].

It is often kept as a pet.<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=EDDY |first1=SYAIFUL |last2=MUTIARA |first2=DIAN |last3=MEDISWATI |first3=ROSWITHA YEMIMA TIUR |last4=RAHMAN |first4=RAMA GIVATI |last5=MILANTARA |first5=NORIL |last6=BASYUNI |first6=MOHAMMAD |date=2021-11-18 |title=Short communication: Diversity of bird species in Air Telang Protected Forest, South Sumatra, Indonesia |journal=Biodiversitas Journal of Biological Diversity |volume=22 |issue=12 |doi=10.13057/biodiv/d221206 |issn=2085-4722|doi-access=free }}</ref>

zh.extract:
黑喉缝叶莺（学名：Orthotomus atrogularis）为鶲科缝叶莺属的鸟类。该物种的模式产地在马来西亚。


亚种
黑喉缝叶莺云南亚种（学名：Orthotomus atrogularis nitidus）。在中国大陆，分布于云南等地。该物种的模式产地在缅甸。
